summary: Performance refactor testing complete. Verified /api/content/init endpoint returns all 8 data sections in single call. All pages load correctly with SiteDataContext providing data. SPA navigation works. Admin login and Cloudinary upload button verified. Note: 2 API calls observed in test due to React StrictMode development behavior - this is expected and won't occur in production.
passed_tests: /api/content/init returns 200 OK
/api/content/init returns all 8 sections (siteSettings, contact, seoSettings, carousel, projects, heroFeatures, homeStats, homeCTA)
siteSettings has site_name field
contact has phone, email, address fields
seoSettings has site_title, site_description fields
carousel returns array with 3 slides, each with image and title
projects returns array with 7 items, each with title, image, type
heroFeatures has badge_text and trust_indicators
homeStats has stats array with 4+ items
homeCTA has title, button_text, button_link
No MongoDB _id exposed in response
Admin login works with admin/admin123
Wrong password correctly rejected with 401
/api/projects endpoint returns projects
/api/blog endpoint returns blog posts
/api/carousel endpoint returns slides
/api/content/about endpoint returns content
Homepage desktop: carousel loads with Unsplash images
Homepage desktop: stats section with 4 stat cards
Homepage desktop: projects section with 3 project cards
Homepage desktop: CTA section present
Homepage desktop: footer with contact info
Homepage mobile (375px): hamburger menu visible and works
Homepage mobile: trust indicators stacked (flex-col)
Homepage mobile: carousel arrows hidden
SPA navigation works: Home -> Projects -> Blog -> About -> Contact -> Hesaplama -> Home
Admin Blog page loads with 'Yeni Yazı' button
Admin Blog form shows 'Bilgisayardan Yükle' (Cloudinary upload) button
All homepage images load without 404 errors
All projects page images load without 404 errors
All blog page images load without 404 errors
Navbar shows site name from SiteDataContext
Footer shows contact info from SiteDataContext
critical_code_review_comments: React StrictMode causes 2 API calls in development - this is expected behavior and won't occur in production. The useRef guard in SiteDataContext is correctly implemented but StrictMode unmounts/remounts components which resets the ref.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Performance refactor verified working. Single /api/content/init endpoint replaces previous site-data + homepage-data endpoints. SiteDataContext fetches all data once and provides to Navbar, Footer, SEOHead, Home.jsx. Home.jsx no longer makes its own API calls. React StrictMode causes 2 API calls in dev but useRef guard prevents duplicate data fetching. All images load from Unsplash/Cloudinary without 404s.

performance_refactor_verification.init_endpoint: /api/content/init returns all 8 sections in single call
components_using_SiteDataContext: Footer.jsx - uses useSiteData() for siteSettings and contactInfo
Home.jsx - uses useSiteData() for all homepage data (no own API call)
